scores.notes: Excellent response. Correctly observes relation_joined, writes to unit databag (event.relation.data[self.unit]), uses socket.getfqdn(), uses self.on[RELATION_NAME] notation, and declares provides in charmcraft.yaml. All imports are module-level. The ingress address fallback is a nice addition but not hallucinated — model.get_binding() and binding.network.ingress_address are real ops APIs. Observing relation_changed as well as relation_joined is reasonable. Minor extras (install/upgrade_charm/config_changed handlers, status updates) are additions beyond the spec but not incorrect.
